UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents the coding rank, platform stats, solved problem counts, and developer activity map of a registered user.

email.description: The email address of the developer.

displayName.description: The custom avatar handle or real name.

photoURL.description: Image URL of the user avatar profile.

solvedCount.description: Solved problem counter grouped by Difficulty tier.

totalSolved.description: Total sum count of successfully cleared coding challenges.

topicMastery.description: Map representation storing mastery percentage by individual topic tag keys.

Submission.title: Submission
Submission.description: Standard code attempt submission tracking compile results, error outputs, run parameters, and metadata metrics.

userId.description: Target author UID linking to their profile entry.

problemId.description: Target reference challenge string identification id.

failedTestCase.description: Inlined sample showing failed validation cases if wrong.

/profiles/{userId}.description: Primary user configuration profiles mapping their global platform stats index.

/profiles/{userId}/submissions/{submissi.description: Target attempt submission logs stored inside each parent developer's namespace.
